justification: The diff successfully migrates javax to jakarta namespaces and updates Spring Boot to 3.x, but fails to fully remove the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter (only commented out the @Override annotation, leaving the class extension intact). It also introduces spurious churn by removing unused imports in DAO files and changing session.invalidate() to request.logout() without context, while the SecurityConfiguration.java changes are incomplete and syntactically awkward.
